name: Macadamia Mandelbrot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer set to medium speed, beat the eggs and vegetable oil for 5 minutes until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar. Beat in the orange juice, grated orange peel, and almond extract.
3. At low speed, gradually beat in the all-purpose flour, baking powder, and salt. Add up to half a cup of additional flour if the dough appears too sticky.
4. Stir in the macadamia nuts. Refrigerate the dough, wrapped in plastic wrap, for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a large cookie sheet.
6. Divide the dough into two equal parts. Shape each half into a 14-inch by 2-inch log.
7. Place the logs on the prepared cookie sheet, spacing them well apart. Bake for 25 minutes until lightly browned.
8. Remove the cookie sheet from the oven and keep the oven temperature on. Transfer the logs to a cutting board.
9. Cut each log into 1-inch diagonal slices. Arrange the slices with the cut side up on the cookie sheet.
10. Return the slices to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes until crisp and golden.
11. Cool the mandelbrot on racks. Makes 30 slices.
